title: GNM Jobs 2026 – Nursing Officer, Staff Nurse
shortInfo: The Mizoram Public Service Commission (Mizoram PSC) Recruitment 2026 for posts of 42 Nursing Officer, Staff Nurse. Candidates with GNM Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 08-05-2026, and closes on 12-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through Mizoram PSC website, mpsc.mizoram.gov.in.

basic_details.job_title: Mizoram PSC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 42 Nursing Officer, Staff Nurse Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Mizoram Public Service Commission (Mizoram PSC) Recruitment 2026 for posts of 42 Nursing Officer, Staff Nurse. Candidates with GNM Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 08-05-2026, and closes on 12-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through Mizoram PSC website, mpsc.mizoram.gov.in.

important_dates.exam_date: To be notified on official website

application_fee.details: Application fee details are as per MPSC norms. Persons with Disabilities (PwBD) are exempted from payment of application fee. Other candidates must check the official portal for exact fee structure.

age_limit.details: Up to 5 years (or as per Government rules)

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions including educational qualification, computer proficiency, Mizo language proficiency, and age limit as on the crucial date (01-01-2026). Government servants must apply through proper channel. Post-Wise Educational Qualification: Additional Mandatory Requirements: Computer Proficiency: As prescribed by Mizoram Group 'A', 'B' & 'C' posts Service/Recruitment (Amendment) Rules, 2023. Candidates must possess Computer Proficiency Certificate. Mizo Language Proficiency: Mandatory requirement. However, exemption is granted to candidates who have studied Mizo up to Class-X or above. Nursing Council Registration: Valid registration certificate from appropriate Nursing Council is mandatory

salary_details.pay_scale: Level 7 of the Pay Matrix (7th CPC)
salary_details.salary: Level 7 of the Pay Matrix (7th CPC)

how_to_apply: Step 1: Visit MPSC Online Portal - Go to https://mpsconline.mizoram.gov.in/
Step 2: One-Time Registration (for New Users) - If you are a new user, complete one-time registration on the portal before 12-06-2026 (4:00 PM). Existing users can directly login.
Step 3: Login to Portal - Login using your registered credentials

Step 4: Fill Application Form - Fill the online application form carefully with all required details: Personal details Educational qualifications Nursing Council registration details Computer proficiency details Mizo language proficiency details Category details (if claiming PwBD/Ex-Servicemen reservation)
Personal details
Educational qualifications
Nursing Council registration details
Computer proficiency details
Mizo language proficiency details
Category details (if claiming PwBD/Ex-Servicemen reservation)
Step 5: Upload Documents - Upload scanned copies of all required documents as per specifications
Step 6: Pay Application Fee - Pay application fee online (if applicable) through available payment modes. PwBD candidates are exempted from fee payment.
Step 7: Submit Application - Review all details carefully and submit the application
Step 8: Verify Submission - Verify that your application status shows "Submitted" after payment. Take printout of submitted application for future reference.
important_instructions: Application must be submitted online only through MPSC online portal
Last date for online application: 12-06-2026 (up to 4:00 PM)
Last date for one-time registration (new users): 12-06-2026 (4:00 PM)
Age calculated as on 01-01-2026: Minimum 21 years, Maximum 35 years
Age relaxation: Up to 5 years for SC/ST or as per Government rules
Educational Qualification: RNRM for Nursing Officer / GNM for Staff Nurse with valid Nursing Council registration
Computer Proficiency Certificate mandatory as per Mizoram Group 'A', 'B' & 'C' posts Service/Recruitment (Amendment) Rules, 2023
Mizo Language Proficiency mandatory (exemption for candidates who studied Mizo up to Class-X or above)
Application fee: PwBD candidates exempted; others as per MPSC norms
Candidates must ensure their application is successfully submitted after payment
Verify that application status shows "Submitted" after fee payment
Government servants should apply through proper channel
Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidate
Selection through: Written Examination + Document Verification + Mizo Language Proficiency Test (wherever applicable)
Syllabus for written examination available on official MPSC website
All updates will be published on the MPSC official website only
Candidates are advised to visit the official website regularly for updates regarding admit card, examination schedule, and results

click_here.text: Download MPSC Nursing Officer & Staff Nurse Recruitment 2026 Official Notification PDF

faq.question: What is the total number of vacancies in MPSC Nursing Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Mizoram PSC has announced 42 contractual vacancies including 40 Nursing Officer and 2 Staff Nurse positions under Health & Family Welfare and Home (Prisons) Departments.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for MPSC Nursing Officer 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit online applications is 12 June 2026 (up to 4:00 PM) through the MPSC online portal.

faq.question: What is the eligibility for MPSC Nursing Officer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must have RNRM registration for Nursing Officer or GNM certificate for Staff Nurse, computer proficiency certificate, and Mizo language proficiency (exemption if studied Mizo up to Class-X).

faq.question: What is the age limit for MPSC Nursing Vacancy 2026?
faq.answer: The age limit is 21 to 35 years as on 01 January 2026, with relaxation for SC/ST and other categories as per Government rules.

faq.question: What is the salary for MPSC Nursing Officer 2026?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive Level 7 Pay Matrix (7th CPC) salary as per Government of Mizoram contractual employee rules.

faq.question: What is the selection process for MPSC Nursing Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection includes Written Examination, Document Verification, and Mizo Language Proficiency Test (where applicable).

faq.question: Is there application fee for MPSC Nursing Officer 2026?
faq.answer: PwBD candidates are exempted from application fee. Other candidates must pay as per MPSC norms (check official portal).

faq.question: What is the qualification required for MPSC Staff Nurse 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must have GNM (General Nursing & Midwifery) certificate and be registered with Nursing Council.
